name: Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, spices, and salt in a large bowl.
3. In another bowl, beat oil, sugar, and eggs at medium speed for one minute.
4. Add mashed bananas to the egg mixture. Mix until well blended.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the banana mixture, stirring only until combined.
6. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center of the loaf comes out clean.
